transcript.text:
('I Was Okja', Located in Sangam-dong, Mapo-gu)
(A restaurant full of happiness)
(And Tzuyang found)
(the all-time best tonkatsu...?)
(The taste...)
(That puts everyone in awe...!)
This is really great
(We made it...!)
This is crazy delicious...! It's so good
(The taste that makes every restaurant owner humble...) I also own a tonkatsu place but this is way better
(Tzuyang's all-time best tonkatsu is soon to be revealed) I think among the tonkatsu that I had in my life
This might be the best one
(@ Sangam-dong, the place that gets filled with green in early summer)
Hello everyone
So I'm here at Sangam-dong today
And I'm here

to get some tonkatsu
Since
('Tzuyang's Giant Pork Cutlet') I own a tonkatsu restaurant now
(Visiting rival stores) I've been checking many tonkatsu places nowadays
And this place
caught my attention because
they have a unique name
and so many people line up even though it's in a residential area
(Sangam-dong, Mapo-gu) 'I Was Okja'
Let's check it out
(The replica of the dish) So this is how the food is presented
That's so cute!
Hello!
Nice to meet you!
- It's an honor to have you here! - No, it's mine actually
- Thanks for letting me visit here during the busy prep time - No problem

(Full of gentle and neat vibe...)
I actually thought if I get to own a tonkatsu place
I wouldn't like tonkatsu from then
(Can't say no to it...) Although I've been eating them a lot, it's still so good
Oh, they have 3 kinds of tonkatsu
(Keeping it simple) Sirloin, cheese, and tenderloin
(And the mouthwatering side dishes) And there's curry, croquette, and spicy octopus platter
I'll make the order!
Yeap?!
(+ Sirloin 1/2 lbs, cheese 1/2 lbs, sirloin 1/2 lbs)* I'll have two of each *Approximate weight
and every one of them here on the side menu!
- So it's extra croquette, curry, and octopus, right? - Yeap
(Order up...!) We got 2 sirloins, 2 cheese, and 2 tenderloins...
(My goodness...)
(And the tonkatsu is being plated one by one)
(The tonkatsu is here) Oh, thank you

(Here is your tonkatsu...) That's tenderloin, octopus, and curry
- And this is cheese tonkatsu - Thank you
- So that's everything? - Yes
(All of them are here) Whoa, it looks so good
I've been eating only Western-style cutlets nowadays
so it's been ages since I had Japanese style
What's this here?
Sesame?
(How to enjoy your cutlet) Grind the sesame seeds and add them to the tonkatsu sauce
So it goes on top
like this
(Setting the sauce beforehand!)
Salt and pepper
I should try it first with the salt
Let's get a bit of it
Whoa...

It's so good...!
A bit of wasabi this time
and the sauce as well
(This is amazing)
The cheese inside
is really great
It's salted mozzarella cheese
that's inside here
It's super savory
and the pork inside
is really thick
(Both of them are all thick...!) So it really gives this awesome texture
It's super savory
The meat and
the cheese are all savory
And it's crispy on the outside

So it feels awesome when you take a bite
Salt...
Adding just the salt is
more than good enough
(Loving it)
Although it's deep fried
It's not greasy at all
How is it?
It's really great!! Hehe
I mean...
that's what I call a delicious dish!
(Excited)
(Something's not right)
(It's a different kind of dish from mine...) Japanese style and Western style are different
I'll finish cheese tonkatsu first
and try the other one

This is so good
I wonder what sauce is this
(What is this?)
Excuse me but, what's this sauce right here?
That's mustard pesto!
It's amazing that
it doesn't really have
that "tang" of the mustard
It's great!
Sirloin!
The most common menu in Japanese-style tonkatsu place
And the amount is so generous!
(A generous amount of juicy cutlet)
It looks so juicy, my gosh!
It's looking already great!
And it's good!

I think this will go well with wasabi
This is a must-visit place...!
(Not a rival store owner...anymore...)
The fried batter on the outside
Well, I can't say it's super crispy
It's rather a bit moist and crispy at the same time
But the meat inside isn't the dry one
It almost feels like a juicy beef steak that's quite bouncy...!
(They nailed it!) And it's so good
What's this one?
Even if you see it at a glance
you can see that
(Super moist and tender...) it's dripping with juice, it's so tender
and soft on the inside
I think a bit of salt
and wasabi are the perfect combo

for this one
(About to faint from deliciousness...) It's out of this world!
(And I made that)
This doesn't feel like it's pork, really
I guess you're happy to hear her comments in the back?
(You got us lol)
(All ears to Tzuyang)
- It's really good! - Haha! Thank you!!
I also have a tonkatsu restaurant
but this place is better...
(Enough said...) Now to tenderloins...
Can't wait to try this one as well
(Can already tell it's on another level...) I gotta try this right away, look
(Can already tell it's on another level...) Even the color is just perfect...
I'll first try it with salt
AMAZING...!

Wha...
(It's so good)
Everything is great here
They're tender and moist
I should try it with the curry!
(Dip-)
This is the kind that I like!
Whoa...
It's so tender!!
That can't be pork!!
(So happy to hear Tzuyang's compliments lolol)
I'm really glad that
I didn't go for the Japanese-style tonkatsu restaurant
We might've been no match for them LOLOL
I just memorized all their recipe
(Say what now...?)

(We're just kidding LOLOLOL) We'll teach you the recipe
But the sirloin is seriously good
It's among the best 3 tonkatsu place
that I had in my life!
(The first pick then...?) Wait, no
How can it be this good?
The breadcrumbs
are soft but crispy at the same time
So it's really interesting
Right, the veggies...
(Not liking it)
Oh, it's good too!
- (That's a relief...) - It's great!
It's not just the sirloin
everything comes in a generous amount
But how can it be

this tender when it's not even
minced at all?
How can it be this tender?
Because it's made from love and effort...?
(That's so cringy...)
We deep-fry it two times at a different temperature
And we let it rest so that
the meat can hold the juice
So it takes a bit more time to cook it than the usual ones
(Curiosity solved)
Thank you
What about the crispy layer?!
(That secret belongs to us!) We don't know it!
(And of course, rice is a must for curry)
This curry really is
the one that I like!!

Everything here is my thing!!
It's got a bit of
Korean-style curry
and Japanese-style curry
and it's delicious!
What's this one?
(The spicy octopus she forgot about) Oh, that's the octopus, I thought it was salmon
It doesn't look like an octopus though
Oh? But it is!!
It's got a tang to it
It really refreshes your mouth
You can't be serious, it's so juicy!
(Anyone can tell it) You can tell that it's juicy
(Glance)
So they're making it themselves now?
They're all busy here too...lol

It's a war for every tonkatsu place!
My restaurant always tenderizes the meat as well!
(Sounding like a construction site...)
- That's for tomorrow? - Yeah
We age the pork for 12 hours...!
Oh, and then it's cooked, I see!
(JK lol) So the secret was aging...!
(Please...stop...lol)
(We can't do it even if we know it though...) But Japanese-style tonkatsu is so hard to make...
I really admire those who make Japanese-style tonkatsu
Now that I've tried each one of them
Let's try the croquette
Oh! It's so fluffy!
(Fluffy...?) What's in here?
Cream cheese...?
Can you tell me what kind of croquette is this?

- It's got crown daisy in it - Crown daisy...?
(How come I'm eating it...?) That's unexpected, I never liked it before
(Even better) And it's great!
The cream inside...
is seasoned very well
Looks delicious!
(It's still juicy...!) Whoa, look at this!
It's still juicy
The food is really great here
It's so good!
Would you like a piece?
(Here you go)
Mmmm!!!!!
It's so good!!
(The foodie producer approves it too...) The texture is really great!
(The foodie producer approves it too...) It's great, huh?

It's so juicy on the inside!
Whoa...
So delicious!!!
(Eyes wide open) What's this one?
I mean this one's like
a tenderloin
It's so soft!
(The nostrils of truth)
(YouTube better have 4D features soon...) I wish all of you could try this now
The pork inside
is exceptionally good
Yaaaaaay!!! Tenderloins!!!!
The juice is on another level
(Packed with juice...!) That's what it makes so good
(I don't believe it...!)
Can't get any better!

(Thumbs up)
(You gotta try this) It's so good
You should try a piece
It'll blow your mind, really
Whaaaa?!?!?!
(The producer is so impressed as well...) This one's good too, it's so good
(Became generous since it's so good...) I usually keep the food to myself, but it's so good that I need to share it
(Super satisfied) It's so delicious!
- The one with tenderloin is our signature menu! - Oh, I see!
No wonder I've been saying it's so good
(Gimmie) So I guess I haven't tried the cheese, right?
(I can hear your intentions lol)
(The producer approves it too...!) This is the best tenderloin tonkatsu that I had so far
You see this juice coming out?
Look how it is...
That's enough

I gotta get it myself
Because the cheese here
is now all hardened
I asked them to have it in a to-go box for later and I ordered a new one!
(Moist + Juice...!) The juice from the meat and cheese is now blended
Ooh! It's hot!!
It's so savory!!!!
(The best tonkatsu place that she won't forget) I think I found a legit must-visit tonkatsu place today
(Awesome)
(Heaps)
(Yeap, this is the heavens...)
(Amazed...) You really ate a lot...!
- How come she can eat all of them? - (Dunno...)
- I still got some room left though... - Really?!?!
That was really great
I really had a great time here

(Finished) That was nice
I really enjoyed the food today
It was the best!
- Such an honor to hear it from you...! - No, I really enjoyed it
- Thanks for the great food - Thank YOU
I think among the tonkatsu that I had in my life
This might be the best one
(It was perfect from beginning to end) I really enjoyed it from start to finish
(It was perfect from beginning to end) and every bite was really delicious
So thanks again
for another delicious meal!
